mapper.insert: insert into stock_reservation ( id, order_no, user_id, sku_id, reserve_num, reservation_status, expire_time, confirmed_time, released_time ) values ( #{id}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{skuId}, #{reserveNum}, #{reservationStatus}, #{expireTime}, #{confirmedTime}, #{releasedTime} )
mapper.select: select from stock_reservation where order_no = #{orderNo} and is_deleted = 0
select from stock_reservation where reservation_status = 0 and expire_time is not null and expire_time <= now() and is_deleted = 0 order by id asc limit #{limit}

select sr.id,sr.order_no,sr.user_id,sr.sku_id,sr.reserve_num,sr.reservation_status,sr.expire_time,sr.confirmed_time,sr.released_time,sr.create_time,sr.update_time,sr.is_deleted from stock_reservation sr join order_info oi on oi.order_no = sr.order_no and oi.is_deleted = 0 where sr.reservation_status = 0 and oi.order_status = #{orderStatus} and sr.is_deleted = 0 order by sr.id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update stock_reservation set reservation_status = 1, confirmed_time = now(), update_time = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and reservation_status = #{fromStatus} and is_deleted = 0
update stock_reservation set reservation_status = 2, released_time = now(), update_time = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and reservation_status = #{fromStatus} and is_deleted = 0
